titleStmt.title: SII 23.149: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 149. (A.R. No. 149 of 1907.) Pūvālaikkuḍi, Tirumayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District Śiva temple—on the south wall of the shrine of the goddess Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 16: 1284 A.D.

summary.p: This belongs to Māṟavarman Kulaśēkharadēva “who took every country.” The details of the date are given as Vriśchika, śu. 1, Wednesday, Rēvati which do not however suit in this year. The inscription registers an endowment of 6(1/2) vēli of land at Kōvaṉūr as a tax-free dēvadāna by the Nāṭṭavar of Vaḍapaṟṟu-nāḍu including Śevvalūr in Kūḍalūr-nāḍu of Teṉkōṉāḍu, and by Kalikaḍinda-Pāṇḍyadēvar, for the maintenance of a service called the Maṟamāṇikkaṉ-śandi instituted by the former in the temple, and for offerings to the image of the goddess consecrated therein by the latter.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . komāṟapaṉma
rāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakkarava
ttikaḷ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ
koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulace
karatevaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu
vṛścikanāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣa
ttu piratamaiyum putaṉkiḻamaiyum
peṟṟa Irevatināḷ teṉkoṉā
ṭṭuk kūṭalūrnāṭṭuc ce
vvalūr Uḷḷiṭṭa vaṭapa
ṟṟunāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom I
nnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppūvālai
kkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār koyi
l Āti caṇṭeśvara tevarkaṉ
mi koyiṟ kaṇakkuṟkum piṭi
pāṭu paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāva
tu Ināyaṉāṟkku nāṅkaḷ kaṭ
ṭiṉa maṟamāṇikkaṉ cantikku
Innāyaṉārukkuc colai
kayilāya muṭaiyāṉāṉa
kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya te
var Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruk
kāmakkoṭṭa nācciyārk
ku Amutupaṭikkum Innāṭṭu kova
ṉūṟ paṟṟāṉa nilattu nāṅkaḷu
m kalikaṭinta pāṇṭiya tevarum
viṭṭa pūvālaikkuṭikkup peru
nāṉkellaiyāvaṉa kiḻpāṟ
kellai koṟṟamaṅkalattu
k kuḷattukkuḷvāykku meṟ
kum teṉpāṟkellai maṟamā
ṇikkap peraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭṭu
c cevvaikku vaṭakkum mel
pāṟkellai pakaiccavarkālap
peraiyaṉ kuṭikkāṭṭukkum peru
mpāṇṭiyerikkum kiḻakkum vaṭa
pāṟkellai nāvaṟkuṭi Ellaikku
t teṟkum Āka vicai
nta perunāṉkellai
kkuṭpaṭṭa nilam 6 10 5- li Iṉ
nilam Āṟarai veliyu
m kuḷaṅkaḷum naṉcey
puṉceyuṅ kiṇokkiṉa kiṇa
ṟum meṉokkiṉa maraṅ
kaḷum maṟṟum Eppeṟpa
ṭṭaṉavum Iṟaiyili te
vatāṉamāka viṭṭu Innaā
yaṉārkku maṟamāṇikkaṉca
ntikkum tiruppaṇikkum
cempātiyum tirukkā
makkoṭṭa nācciyā
rkku Amutupaṭikkum
tiruppaṇikkum cem
pātiyum cantirātit
tavarai celvatāka
k kalliluñ cempi
lum veṭṭikkuṭut
tu nāṉkellaiyi
lum tiruccūlatāpa
ṉamum paṇṇikkuṭu
ttom Uṭaiyār
tiruppūvālaikkuṭi
yuṭaiya nāyaṉār ko
yil Āti taṇṭecu
rar tevakaṉmi koyi
ṟ kaṇakkarkkum te
ṉkoṉāṭṭuk kūṭalū
rnāṭṭu cevvalū
r Uḷḷiṭṭa vaṭapaṟ
ṟunāṭṭavarom
Ippaṭikkuc cev
valūr melainilai Ū
rāyicainta Ūravar
sayjñā taṉmaikku Ivvū
ṟ kaṇakkuc cempāṭu
ṭaiyār Āṇṭavaṉ mā
taṉāṉa parkaṭakaṇṭa
veḷā ṉeḻuttu
Ippaṭikku kovva
kūḷipiṟai cempūti mati
yāṉ teṉūr Aracar mi
kāmaṉ nilai Ivvūrka
ḷil Ūrāyicainta Ū
ravarkaḷ sayijñā taṉmai
kku Iṉṉāṭṭuk kaṇakkaStops with this.
Digital edition of SII 23.149 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
